name: Meatloaf
method: On a parchment-lined loaf pan, form a loaf with the meat mixture and pour ketchup on top. Bake at 350 °F for 30 minutes covered, remove foil and bake an additional 10-15 minutes. This is one of my American dishes, there are a couple of them in this book. In Italy, they call meatloaf polpettone. Polpetta means meatball so it's a great big one! Serving suggestion, mashed potatoes, fresh bread, and salad. Serves 4. Olé
